title: Home Based Parenting Education * Ex-Offenders - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Parenting & Childcare > Home Based Parenting Education * Ex-Offenders 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter African American Community At Risk Families Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Domestic Violence Issues Ex-Offenders Hispanic/Latino Community TANF Recipients Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF PATHFINDER NETWORK PATHFINDER NETWORK CENTER FOR FAMILY SUCCESS HOME VISITING PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides parenting support to families who are involved in the criminal justice system through weekly home visits which include helping parents with child-centered play, learning about childhood development, developmental screening, and information and referral to other social and health services 7305 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Families who are involved in the criminal justice system who have children ages 0-6 regardless of current custodial status Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 892-5396 1003 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PATHFINDER NETWORK HOME VISITING PROGRAM
